history.subject: First descent leg on unit modules = ring restriction along the overlap immersion (P0.2/P0.3 a-side atom). glueLegAComponent_unit: for any rank-one (unit) descent datum, composing the a-leg with the pushforward of the pullbackUnitIso trivialization is the pushforward of unitToPushforwardObjUnit of f_ij — via the homEquiv identity pullbackObjUnitToUnit = homEquiv.symm(unitToPushforwardObjUnit) and naturality of pushforwardComp. Section level (glueLegAComponent_unit_app): the a-side of the Serre-twist compatible-family condition is literally (f_ij).appTop. Axiom-clean.

Close Stacks 02KE i=0 (pullback_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv_of_quasiCompact): B ⊗_A Γ(F, f⁻¹V) ≃ₗ[B] Γ(g'^*F, f'⁻¹U) pinned at 1⊗t ↦ baseMap t, for flat affine base change over a quasi-compact quasi-separated preimage. Proof by the finite-affine-cover equalizer ladder: sheaf-condition eqLocus presentation of Γ(F, f⁻¹V), flat tensoring commutes with the finite equalizer, per-piece affine comparisons are ring-pushout isos, overlap injectivity by one further finite affine descent, generators pinned by separatedness. Also repairs the abstract SectionBaseChange module-dialect ladder (was left non-compiling by an earlier lane). Axiom-clean [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound].
Add algebraic bricks for Γ-fibre base change: annihilator monotonicity under tensoring (Ann M ⊆ Ann(M⊗N)) and finrank transport across a base-change linear equivalence (dim_{k'}(k'⊗_k V) = dim_k V)
feat(picard): affine tensor-section comparison map for Modules.tensorObj
Div base change: reduce ker-pullback to one monomorphism
Milne 3.3 substeps: fibre-irreducible slice existence (2-topo-a) and Krull-Hauptidealsatz diagonal transport (4b), axiom-clean
docstring: correct difference-map corollary cross-reference in Milne 3.3 substeps

Wire the Albanese Pic⁰ bundle to the abelian-variety substrate. Over an algebraically closed base, a smooth scheme is geometrically reduced (base-change each test field to its algebraic closure, where smoothness forces reducedness, then descend along the faithfully flat projection since a flat local hom of local rings is faithfully flat hence injective); combined with geometric irreducibility this yields GeometricallyIntegral of the curve. A smooth geometrically irreducible curve over k̄ has a k̄-rational point (nonempty Jacobson space has a closed point, promoted to a section via pointEquivClosedPoint), discharging HasRationalPoint. These bridges replace the opaque Pic0.bundle sorry with an honest construction reading off Scheme.Pic0.{grpObj,proper,smooth,geometricallyIrreducible}; residual sorryAx is inherited only from the tracked upstream Pic0 smooth/proper and the FGA representability sorry.
Serre twist O(m): concrete compatible-family condition (Xᵢ/Xⱼ)^m·sᵢ|_V = sⱼ|_V
Chart sections of Proj ℤ[X] are the degree-zero localization Away Xᵢ
